milestones.title: Manifesto & Website Study
milestones.description: First publication of the manifesto and the experimental website as a visual direction.

milestones.title: Interactive Platform
milestones.description: Manifesto Remixer, Stamp Generator, and Live Ticker make the ideas tangible.

milestones.title: AI Sparring Partner
milestones.description: Chat widget enables direct dialogue with AI as a thinking tool.

milestones.title: Ideas Archive & Community
milestones.description: Open archive for thinking challenges, Contradiction Salon topics, and pull-request contributions.

milestones.title: First Contradiction Salon
milestones.description: Public event: moderated dialogue on a controversial contemporary topic.

milestones.title: Micro-Experiments & Quiz
milestones.description: Interactive tools for self-assessment: Where do you stand? Which questions move you?

milestones.title: Media & Audio Manifesto
milestones.description: The manifesto as an audio version, short videos, and additional media formats.

milestones.title: Atelier Pilot Program
milestones.description: First cohort begins: interdisciplinary learning on real questions.

events.title: Contradiction Salon #2
events.description: Topic: What is the Radical Middle in the climate debate?
